title: lysimachia arvensis subsp. parviflora
intro: Lysimachia arvensis subsp. parviflora, also known as lesser yellow pimpernel, is a perennial herb belonging to the primrose family (Primulaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Lysimachia arvensis subsp. parviflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
